commitResults.messageTitle: Add help command and refresh Mercury UI
commitResults.messageBody:
Replace the JavaFX layout with a styled BorderPane and dialog boxes so the app matches the new theme.

Wire the C-Help command into the parser and UI, expose the helper text in docs, and surface it in both CLI and GUI.

commitResults.messageTitle: Refactor persistence and search for better quality
commitResults.messageBody:
Use modern file APIs, defensive assertions, and helper parsing in Storage so saves and loads are more predictable.

Add stream-based filtering plus stronger TaskList invariants so the search/list flows become concise while satisfying A-Assertions, A-CodeQuality, and A-Streams.

commitResults.messageTitle: Use GitHub Flavored Markdown for README
commitResults.messageBody:
Update README.md to use GitHub Flavored Markdown (GFMD) features
including tables, checkboxes, code blocks, and proper headings.
Replace the Duke template with Mercury-specific documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commitResults.messageTitle: Improve GUI: error highlighting, remove profile pictures, allow resize
commitResults.messageBody:
- Add MercuryResponse class to carry error status alongside the message
- Show error responses in red-highlighted dialog box for immediate visibility
- Remove oversized placeholder profile pictures to maximize chat area
- Make dialog boxes text-only for a cleaner, space-efficient layout
- Add error-dialog CSS class with red border and dark red text
- Allow window to resize freely (removed fixed min height)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commitResults.messageTitle: Add Mercury personality: messenger-god themed responses and welcome
commitResults.messageBody:
- Update welcome message to reflect Mercury's divine messenger identity
- Restyle task-added/deleted/marked/unmarked messages with mission metaphors
- Update goodbye message to match Mercury's fleet-footed character
- Expand help output to include stats command and aligned descriptions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commitResults.messageTitle: Add more error handling: input validation, duplicate detection, clearer errors
commitResults.messageBody:
- Normalize whitespace: trim and collapse multiple spaces before parsing
- Detect duplicate tasks by comparing string representations before adding
- Validate that mark/unmark/delete take exactly one positive integer
- Check event /to appears after /from; reject identical from/to times
- Ensure deadline description is non-empty before /by
- Provide helpful error messages naming the invalid token or expected format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commitResults.messageTitle: Add comprehensive JUnit tests for parser, commands, storage, and tasks
commitResults.messageBody:
- ParserMoreTest: tests for list, help, mark, unmark, delete, deadline,
  event, find, edge cases (missing args, invalid numbers, bad dates)
- DeadlineMoreTest: format, done status, file string, statusIcon
- EventMoreTest: format, done status, file string, date-time values
- TaskListMoreTest: get, delete, multiple types, size, getAllTasks
- AddCommandTest: adds task, correct description, multiple tasks
- MarkUnmarkCommandTest: mark/unmark success and invalid index errors
- DeleteCommandTest: correct deletion, empty list, invalid index
- StorageTest: save/load for Todo, Deadline, Event; done status; overwrite

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commitResults.messageTitle: Add Week 7 AI usage notes to ai.md
commitResults.messageBody:
Document Claude-assisted implementations for BetterGui, Personality,
MoreErrorHandling, MoreTesting, and Week7-Mysterious (stats command).
Note lessons learned: verify AI-generated tests against actual behavior
before committing, and review AI output to avoid autopilot mistakes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commitResults.messageTitle: Add full user guide for Mercury in docs/README.md
commitResults.messageBody:
Replace placeholder content with a complete user guide covering all
commands (todo, deadline, event, list, mark, unmark, delete, find,
stats, cheer, help, bye), task format reference, data storage details,
error handling notes, and FAQ. Corrects the title from Duke to Mercury.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commitResults.messageTitle: Add stats command: display task completion statistics (A-Week7-Mysterious)
commitResults.messageBody:
Implement a new 'stats' command that shows a summary of the task list:
- Total task count, done count, pending count
- Breakdown by type: todos, deadlines, events

Add StatsCommand class, showStats() in Ui, and parser integration.
This gives users a quick dashboard view of their task progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
